objective: Standardize SCAR routing from intake through QA disposition with explicit states.
triggerEvent: Supplier sends formal SCAR response email to quality inbox
notificationNeeds: Notify assignee on each transition; weekly digest for overdue.
auditTrailRequirements: Immutable status history; link to CAPA when disposition is corrective action.
businessReason: Reduce cycle time while preserving ISO 13485 evidence.
